events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: EMT bending & installation, observed field condition improper coupling engagement, rough-complete, heavy industrial. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Improper coupling engagement means EMT conduit couplings not properly engaged, could be loose, not secure, violates NEC Art. 358 (EMT requirements). It is a defect. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete roughly 70% until defects corrected (scenario says treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected). Component conditions installed-defective. Risk? Improper coupling engagement could lead to conduit separation, wire damage, grounding issues. In industrial site, high? Could be medium or high. Need decide. Since defect is non-compliant and could affect safety/integrity, risk high maybe. But is it critical? Not energized maybe, but rough-complete. Improper coupling engagement is a code violation; if not corrected before wire pull, could damage insulation, compromise grounding continuity. Risk high. Decision fail. Findings: couplings not fully engaged/secure; EMT run may not maintain electrical continuity and mechanical protection. Actions: remove/reseat couplings, ensure proper thread engagement/tightness per manufacturer and NEC, inspect all couplings, torque as required, re-inspect before wire pull. References: NEC Art. 358 (EMT), maybe 110.12 mechanical execution. Also Ch.9 fill not relevant. Need include component_conditions list with installed-defective and non-compliant? The schema component_conditions options: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. We can include installed-defective and non-compliant. The scenario says categories that may apply installed-defective. Non-compliant also applies. Use both. Workable empty? Not asked what work can still start. Use empty list. Sound fields not relevant: sound_source empty string? Schema string. Use "". event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list. value 0. Percent complete 70. Confidence 0.95. Rationale brief. Need ensure valid JSON only, no markdown.
